/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sd-experiment.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/sd-experiment.dir/main.cpp.o" -o sd-experiment  stable-diffusion.cpp/libstable-diffusion.a stable-diffusion.cpp/ggml/src/libggml.a -ldl stable-diffusion.cpp/ggml/src/libggml-cpu.a stable-diffusion.cpp/ggml/src/libggml-base.a -lm /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/15/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
